Class FriendService

java.lang.Object
service.FriendService
public class FriendService extends Object
Provides friendship queries and operations for the current session.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    FriendService(SocialNetwork network, Session session)
    Creates a friendship service.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    addFriendToCurrentUser(String friendId)
    Adds a friendship between the current user and another user.
    boolean
    areFriends(String userId1, String userId2)
    Tests whether two existing users are friends.
    List<User>
    filterCurrentUserFriendsByHometown(String hometown)
    Filters the current user's friends by exact hometown.
    List<User>
    filterCurrentUserFriendsByWorkplace(String workplace)
    Filters the current user's friends by exact workplace.
    Set<User>
    getCommonFriends(String otherUserId)
    Finds users who are friends with both the current user and another user.
    List<User>
    getCurrentUserFriends()
    Returns the current user's friends.
    List<User>
    getFriendsOfUser(String userId)
    Returns a user's friends, excluding the currently logged-in user.
    boolean
    removeFriendFromCurrentUser(String friendId)
    Removes a friendship between the current user and another user.

  • Constructor Details

    • FriendService

      public FriendService(SocialNetwork network, Session session)
      Creates a friendship service.
      Parameters:
      network - social network to query and modify
      session - source of the current user ID

  • Method Details

    • getCurrentUserFriends

      public List<User> getCurrentUserFriends()
      Returns the current user's friends.
      Returns:
      current friends, or an empty list when no user is logged in

    • getFriendsOfUser

      public List<User> getFriendsOfUser(String userId)
      Returns a user's friends, excluding the currently logged-in user.
      Parameters:
      userId - user whose friends should be returned
      Returns:
      matching users, or an empty list when the user does not exist

    • addFriendToCurrentUser

      public boolean addFriendToCurrentUser(String friendId)
      Adds a friendship between the current user and another user.
      Parameters:
      friendId - user ID to add
      Returns:
      true when a new friendship is created

    • removeFriendFromCurrentUser

      public boolean removeFriendFromCurrentUser(String friendId)
      Removes a friendship between the current user and another user.
      Parameters:
      friendId - user ID to remove
      Returns:
      true when an existing friendship is removed

    • getCommonFriends

      public Set<User> getCommonFriends(String otherUserId)
      Finds users who are friends with both the current user and another user.
      Parameters:
      otherUserId - other user's ID
      Returns:
      common friends, or an empty set when either user is unavailable

    • filterCurrentUserFriendsByHometown

      public List<User> filterCurrentUserFriendsByHometown(String hometown)
      Filters the current user's friends by exact hometown.
      Parameters:
      hometown - hometown to match
      Returns:
      friends with the specified hometown

    • filterCurrentUserFriendsByWorkplace

      public List<User> filterCurrentUserFriendsByWorkplace(String workplace)
      Filters the current user's friends by exact workplace.
      Parameters:
      workplace - workplace to match
      Returns:
      friends with the specified workplace

    • areFriends

      public boolean areFriends(String userId1, String userId2)
      Tests whether two existing users are friends.
      Parameters:
      userId1 - first user ID
      userId2 - second user ID
      Returns:
      true when the first user's friend set contains the second user
